zh.Over Wallop, Hampshire, England: 英國哈普爾奧維 瓦洛普
zh.Stockton, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯托克頓
zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Jeffes於1500年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾福。她於1567年2月14日與Richard Basset在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯托克頓結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1567年享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯托克頓。

zh-hans.Stockton, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾斯托克頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Jeffes于1500年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾福。她于1567年2月14日与Richard Basset在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾斯托克頓结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1567年享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾斯托克頓。

nameMeanings.name: Jeffes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Jeffs
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Jeff , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Jeffes was born in 1500, in Pewsey, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard Basset on 14 February 1567, in Stockton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 9 daughters. She died in 1567, at the age of 67, and was buried in Stockton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Jeffes est née en 1500, à Pewsey, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard Basset le 14 février 1567, à Stockton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée en 1567, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Stockton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Jeffes wurde 1500 in Pewsey, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat am 14. Februar 1567 in Stockton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb 1567 im Alter von 67 Jahren und wurde in Stockton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Jeffes è nata il nel 1500 nel Pewsey, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard Basset il 14 febbraio 1567, nel Stockton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1567, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Stockton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Over Wallop, Hampshire, England: イギリスハンプシュアイアオバー ワロップ
ja.Stockton, Warwickshire, England: イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストクトン
ja.Pewsey, Wiltshire, England: イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアペウセイ
ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Jeffesは1500年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアペウセイで生まれた。1567年2月14日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストクトンでRichard Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1567年に67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストクトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Jeffes(은)는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 pw시에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1567년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스톡턴에서 Richard Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1567년 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스톡턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Jeffes nasceu em 1500, em Pewsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Richard Basset em 14 de fevereiro de 1567, em Stockton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1567, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Stockton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Jeffes родилась в 1500 г. в местности пюси, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Basset 14 февраля 1567 г. в местности стокктон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1567 г. в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности стокктон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes Jeffes nació en 1500, en Pewsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Richard Basset el 14 de febrero de 1567, en Stockton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1567, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Stockton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
